description.ko: 공중에 매달린 투명 렌즈의 연쇄가 하얀 에너지 섬광을 빠른 무지개 카스틱과 빛나는 색수차 halo로 분산합니다.
description.en: A suspended cascade of clear lenses fractures a white energy flare into fast rainbow caustics and luminous chromatic halos.

prompt: PRISM-2 light refraction event in a bright white optical conservatory: a floating cascade of wafer-thin convex glass lenses hangs in midair like transparent stepping stones, each lens rotated at a different angle around a compact white energy flare. The flare expands through the lenses as fast, clean sheets of dispersed light, creating overlapping crescent rainbow caustics, prismatic halos, and razor-edged chromatic aberration at every rim. Use vivid #FF0080 magenta splinters, #00FF80 mint green refraction trails, #8000FF violet edge glow, and #FFFF00 yellow focal sparks against a luminous high-key atmosphere. Low sparse particles only, polished glass clarity, no floor-bound prism, no dark surface, dynamic motion blur on the spectral sheets, crisp internal reflections, pure rainbow energy suspended in air.
